3326300.name: Inside Byte: Chapter 1
3326300.description:
CHAPTER 1: DEADLY REALITY

  • Explore:

    Enter the company's dark corridors, where the unknown lurks around every corner. Abandoned rooms and forgotten documents hold secrets and horrors, waiting for the player who has the courage to investigate every detail.

  • Use the Glasses:

    With the powerful Chroma Virtual Experience in your hands, an advanced virtual reality technology, explore an extra layer of reality by accessing immersive minigames.

  • Discover Secrets:

    Every corner hides clues and fragments that reveal hidden layers of the story. Only the most attentive players will notice all the details spread across the scene, connecting the pieces of a dark mystery.

  • Escape and Survive:

    Get ready to face creatures that will do anything to destroy you. Each encounter is deadly, and your only chance is to use the environment to your advantage. Hide in the shadows and be sneaky so you don't get seen.
3326300.supported_languages:
英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
